title: Vulkan [16x]
description: This is a resourcepack that I made. It was made with the pvp-usability in mind.
body: Vulkan 16x is an awesome PvP pack with volcano-inspired colours. Every texture was designed to look good without becoming distracting during fights, making it perfect for fights. Despite the very colourful colour palette, the textures remain easy on the eyes and work well for long sessions. If you want a pack that combines strong visuals with PvP performance, Vulkan 16x delivers a stylish experience that feels great to use in every fight.
